boundary: This workflow compares Geode CCR and rulemaking records against a saved Colorado Rulemaking Search snapshot. It does not call the live website during search and does not treat uncertain matches as confirmed.
next_steps: Export or capture a Rulemaking Search snapshot using the template columns.
Run this command again with --official-snapshot pointing to the CSV, JSON, or JSONL file.
Review the comparison output before using the status labels in release testing.
